title: ABC - Fashion Retailer
description: In just seven months, we helped them grow organic traffic by 380%, land the number-one spot for 47 important keywords, and add real extra sales through better SEO and app store work.

title: DSA Clinics - Healthcare
description: Appointment bookings jumped 420%, they ranked on the first page for more than 120 local searches, and every rupee spent on marketing came back five times over.

title: GDF - Fintech Startup
description: We built and launched their app in eight weeks. It picked up 68,000 downloads in the first three months and turned 42% of those users into active customers.
